Alright, Dom the Tree brought up that the text in this splash is Turkish
Any theories? Is the White Kingdom based on Turkey?
https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pamukkale

embeds.title: Pamukkale
embeds.description: Pamukkale, (Turkish pronunciation: [pa'muk̚kale]) meaning "cotton castle" in Turkish, is a natural site in Denizli Province in southwestern Turkey. The area is famous for a carbonate mineral left by the flowing of thermal spring water. It is located in Turkey's Inner Aegean region, in the River Mend
